meta.notes: Fresh rerun of the latest Codex benchmark prompt with each timed step executed separately. No install step and no upload step. The script was run with --target-lang es --no-lip-sync. Internal stage timings were inferred from the script's own elapsed-time log markers. The measured skill_run duration exceeded the last logged pipeline stage because cloned-voice cleanup continued after the script printed Done:. Token totals were isolated to this benchmark window with extract-codex-tokens.py --latest --after ... --before ... --json.

test_input.name: charli-daily-vlog.mp4
test_input.description: Portrait vlog benchmark asset with spoken English audio for Spanish dubbing without lip sync.

task.name: video-translation
task.purpose: Benchmark the local video-translation skill against the standard 67.8s daily vlog asset using Spanish dubbing with no lip sync.
task.expected_output: A Spanish-dubbed mp4 with the original video track and replaced audio, using a cloned speaker voice when cloning succeeds.

install.notes: Not applicable. The skill was already present locally at ~/code/nova3-agent-skills/video-translation/.

steps.name: extract_audio
steps.notes: Inferred from stage log: Extracting audio started at 0.0s and transcription started at 1.2s.

steps.name: transcribe_waterfall
steps.notes: Inferred from stage log: transcription ran from 1.2s to 5.7s. Whisper succeeded on the first provider attempt and returned 690 chars.

steps.name: translate_gpt4o
steps.notes: Inferred from stage log: translation ran from 5.7s to 9.4s. Translated text length was 726 chars.

steps.name: voice_clone_elevenlabs
steps.notes: Inferred from stage log: voice cloning ran from 9.4s to 14.2s. Cloned voice ID: 8oufHRD6dZfPizkfnDNz.

steps.name: tts_eleven_v3
steps.notes: Inferred from stage log: TTS ran from 14.2s to 44.6s using eleven_v3. Output TTS audio size was 698.4 KB.

steps.name: replace_audio_ffmpeg
steps.notes: Inferred approximately from the final stage marker at 44.6s and the rounded Done line at 45s.

execution.notes: Execution total is probe + full skill_run. Named substep durations come from the script's elapsed-time stage markers and sum to about 45s; the remaining ~4.1s inside skill_run occurred after Done: was printed and aligns with cloned-voice cleanup before process exit.

delivery.notes: Local delivery only; output remained on disk at /tmp/bench_vt_output.mp4.

tokens._note: Extractor-authoritative total token delta from extract-codex-tokens.py for this benchmark window. cache_read_tokens and cache_write_tokens are reported separately and are not added again into total_tokens here.

cost._note: Codex cost in this artifact follows extract-codex-tokens.py methodology: price input_tokens and output_tokens only. cache_read_tokens and cache_write_tokens are retained as informational fields and are not separately charged here.
